title: D-Frag!
sourceNotes: Single-season, 12-episode TV anime (Brain's Base, 2014) adapts manga ch. 1-36 (~vol. 1-4), covering the Game Creation Club (Provisional)'s formation through its showdown with the ex-Student Council. Manga ongoing (current ch. ~176). Episodic gag-comedy source with no formally named story arcs beyond this stretch.
